children.label: Age
children.definition: Age of participant in years.

children.label: Education (years)
children.definition: Years of formal education completed.

children.label: Imaging modality
children.definition: Research-grade MR, clinical MR, or clinical CT acquisition.

domains.label: Clinical Profile
domains.definition: Behavioural and whole-brain clinical severity measures.

children.label: Aphasia severity (WAB-R quotient)
children.definition: Western Aphasia Battery-Revised aphasia quotient (0-100 on the raw scale; higher is less impaired). Stored rank-based inverse-normal transformed.

children.label: Whole-brain lesion load
children.definition: Aggregate lesion burden over the whole brain.

children.label: Whole-brain lesion volume
children.definition: Proportion of the left hemisphere that is lesioned (log-transformed).

domains.label: Brain Lesion Topography
domains.definition: Per-region proportion of tissue lesioned across a combined cortical, subcortical and cerebellar parcellation.

context: NUMERACY_STROKE (OpenNeuro ds006533): 105 left-hemisphere chronic stroke survivors assessed on approximate and precise numeracy. Features are demographics, aphasia severity, whole-brain lesion volume, and per-region lesion overlap across a combined cortical (Schaefer-2018/Yeo-7), subcortical (Tian scale-IV), and cerebellar (Nettekoven-2024) parcellation. Predictors are organised into demographics/background, a clinical profile, and a brain-lesion-topography domain resolved down to individual parcels.
